prestazioni: Engine: 2.9L Ferrari-derived F154 CB V6 (690T) with upgraded Garrett GT3582R turbochargers (1.2 bar boost, 650+ HP), custom Akrapović 3.5" titanium downpipes, and a Motec M150 ECU with custom fueling maps for E85 compatibility (ID1000 injectors, Walbro 450 LPH pump).

Suspension: Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (2-way adjustable damping, 20mm drop), custom Alfa-specific spherical bearing upper control arms (SuperPro poly bushings), and a Cusco 2-point front strut brace with integrated carbon fiber reinforcement.

Drivetrain: Wavetrac Torsen LSD (3.73 final drive ratio), Sachs Performance SMG-style paddle-shift clutch (dual-mass flywheel delete), and a custom Quaife ATB differential with billet steel housing for the rear axle.
estetica: Aero: Novitec Torado Giulia QV widebody kit (carbon fiber fenders, 30mm extended wheel arches), custom 3D-printed front splitter with integrated Gurney flap (CFD-optimized for 120kg downforce at 200km/h), and a Maxton Design GT rear wing (adjustable angle, 3K carbon weave).

Wheels: HRE FF01 20x10.5 ET35 (front) and 20x12 ET45 (rear) in matte bronze, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30/20 front, 325/25/20 rear) with custom Alfa Romeo Quadrifoglio center caps.

Exterior: Full Respray in Alfa Rosso Competizione with custom pearlescent flakes (PPG D8187), carbon fiber engine cover (Novitec), and de-chromed badges with blacked-out Alfa Romeo script (vinyl-wrapped for reversibility).
